title: GrandmaPork's Adventure Pack
description: The goal of this modpack is to explore a beautiful world, and build to your imagination!
body:
Modpack has been remade. Will be up-to-date shortly

 

My modpack is one based around adventure and exploration. I have added the waystones mod for those who want to get back to far areas in the case of death. If you choose to explore, you can discover many different structures and villages. The world is shaped into continents which allows you to discover new land! If you choose to settle down, I have added many ways to decorate your builds. I have also included some shaders to improve the experience. Tectonic and distant horizons go hand in hand, allowing you to see mountains or islands that are thousands of blocks away.

[B] means it contains the full list of mods for both servers and clients. Will be the largest file. For singleplayer users

[S] means it includes mods that only need to be downloaded server side

[C] means it includes mods only needed for clients who want to connect to a server

 

First category will be Quality of Life mods (all categories in alphabetical order)
